_comment: Dev-time defaults for the embedded.html {{placeholders}}. Used by `wix dev`. Production values are pushed by pushEmbeddedScript().
_protectedPages_comment: Base64 of '[]' — empty array of per-page lock configs.
_siteWideLock_comment: Base64 of a JSON object: { pagePath, passwordHash, rememberVisitor, wrongPasswordAction, redirectUrl, wrongPasswordMessage, logoUrl, bgImageUrl, bgOverlayOpacity, inputBorderRadius, showPasswordToggle, buttonBorderRadius, buttonColor, customTitle, customSubtitle, isPremium }. Set to empty string to disable site-wide lock.
